name: dynamical-memory-engine
description: Provenance-first structural memory runtime and JSON inspection runners.

scripts.test:probe: node tests/test_probe_report_receipts.js && node tests/test_active_interaction_zone_probe.js && node tests/test_basin_identity_diagnostics_calibrated.js && node tests/test_basin_phase_ratio_probe.js && node tests/test_boundary_stress_test_probe.js && node tests/test_continuous_master_phase_probe.js && node tests/test_continuous_replay_flow_probe.js && node tests/test_directional_flow_probe.js && node tests/test_harmonic_placement_resonance_probe.js && node tests/test_identity_probe_multiscale.js && node tests/test_identity_probe_scale_calibrated.js && node tests/test_passive_multiscale_evaluation.js && node tests/test_real_source_replay_probe.js && node tests/test_replay_resilience_surface_probe.js && node tests/test_rms_envelope_adapter.js && node tests/test_spectral_concentration_probe.js && node tests/test_structural_transition_probe.js && node tests/test_tighter_band_real_source_probe.js
scripts.test:core: npm run test:substrate && npm run test:anomaly-fencing && npm run test:attention-memory && npm run test:cross-run-dynamics && npm run test:cross-run-session && npm run test:door-one-contracts && npm run test:door-one-executive-lane && npm run test:door-one-ingest-hardening && npm run test:door-one-live-provenance-retention && npm run test:door-one-provenance-digest && npm run test:door-one-workbench && npm run test:gate-benchmark-metastable-hold && npm run test:merge-fencing && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run test:query-posture && npm run test:receipt-schemas && npm run test:tiny-filesystem-runner && npm run test:trajectory-interpretation && npm run test:workbench-lm-wrapper && npm run test:local-lm-benchmark
scripts.test:active: npm run test:core && npm run test:reconstruction
